betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Atmospheric Buffs: Environmental Controller§f

§aBroadcast passive potion effects and creative flight to everyone in your base area!§f

Keeping beacons fed is tedious. The RFTools §bEnvironmental Controller§f allows you to apply constant, active status effects over a massive radius using electrical power.

§6Controller Specifications§f:
§b• RF Buffer§f: Stores up to §e500,000 RF§f, receiving §e20,000 RF/tick§f.
§b• Minimum Consumption§f: Draws at least §e5 RF/tick§f while active, even with no modules.
§b• Bounding Box§f: Insert a §bRange Module§f (Tier 1-3) to configure the controller's active radius.

§6Active Modules & Power Costs§f:
Power consumption is calculated dynamically based on the volume of the active bounding box (radius in blocks) and the module inserted:
§b• Flight Module§f: Grants creative flight. Consumes §e0.004 RF/tick per block§f of radius.
§b• Regeneration Module§f: Consumes §e0.0015 RF/tick per block§f (Regen Plus: §e0.0045 RF/tick§f).
§b• Saturation Module§f: Prevents hunger. Consumes §e0.001 RF/tick per block§f (Plus: §e0.003 RF/tick§f).
§b• Speed Module§f: Consumes §e0.001 RF/tick per block§f (Speed Plus: §e0.003 RF/tick§f).
§b• Haste Module§f: Consumes §e0.001 RF/tick per block§f (Haste Plus: §e0.003 RF/tick§f).
§b• Night Vision Module§f: Consumes §e0.001 RF/tick per block§f.
§b• Peaceful Module§f: Prevents hostile mob spawns. Consumes §e0.001 RF/tick per block§f.

§6Filters & Player Restrictions§f:
§b• Mob Multiplier§f: You can toggle the controller to affect mobs. If active, the power usage is multiplied by §c2.0×§f.
§b• Player Safety Guard§f: In this modpack, the §bPoison§f, §bBlindness§f, and §bWeakness§f modules are configured to §cnever affect players§f (`poisonAvailable=false`, `blindnessAvailable=false`, `weaknessAvailable=false`). They can only be used as base defenses against hostile mobs.
